review_basis: existing source/front selected for G0 review instead of B0 regeneration
Codex visual review against the v22 G0 checklist
no new image generation was performed

review_items.item: same adult cute female character identity is appealing enough for production expansion
review_items.evidence: Adult cute female identity is coherent and consistent with the current character-002 source direction.

review_items.item: front/near-front upper-body pose is centered and not cropped
review_items.evidence: Face, hair, shoulders, neck, and torso are centered; lower sleeves/body are not the production boundary for G0 and should be completed by B5.

review_items.item: both eyes are visible and eye size is not too large
review_items.evidence: Both eyes are fully visible, readable, symmetrical enough for the existing v21/v22 eye-anchor baseline, and not oversized.

review_items.item: mouth is visible, small enough, and placed naturally
review_items.evidence: Mouth is visible, subtle, naturally placed, and small enough for a controlled B3 mouth packet.

review_items.item: nose is visible as subtle face detail
review_items.evidence: Nose is visible as a subtle highlight/detail and should be preserved in B5 face-detail generation.

review_items.item: front/side/back hair groups are readable and not fused into one mass
review_items.evidence: Bangs, side hair, long side locks, and back hair silhouette are readable enough to guide B4 hair children.

review_items.item: neck, shoulders, torso, collar, and simple upper arms are visible
review_items.evidence: Neck, shoulders, torso, collar/strap area, and simple upper arms are visible; B5 must create complete clothing/arm underpaint rather than relying on the cropped source bottom.

review_items.item: no props, hands, hair, or accessories cover eyes or mouth
review_items.evidence: No hands, props, labels, or accessories obscure the eyes or mouth; hair occlusion is limited to normal bangs.

review_items.item: design appears splittable into 64 v2_standard parts
review_items.evidence: The simple outfit, readable hair groups, visible face features, and uncluttered silhouette are compatible with the confirmed 64-part v2_standard split.

review_items.item: no labels, part names, guide marks, or diagram layout
review_items.evidence: The source is a coherent character image with no labels, guide marks, UI, text, or part-sheet layout.

limitations: This is G0 source/style acceptance, not G1 64-part completeness.
Lower body/sleeve completion, clean bases, underpaints, eyes, mouth, and hair children still require B1-B5 generation.
Mini Cubism diagnostic PASS and real Cubism CMO3/deformer/keyform PASS remain separate later gates.
next_action: unlock B1-B5 image-generation preparation from the v22 input packet
generate clean bases/underpaint first so baked eye or mouth pixels are not patched late
build technical validators and contact sheets before Mini Cubism diagnostic preview
